Comment: Weekly Reporting Workflow for RideShare Analytics Platform. This workflow runs weekly to generate comprehensive business intelligence reports by querying historical data from Athena, processing results, and distributing personalized reports to stakeholders.

CheckDataAvailability.Comment: Verify that data is available for the past 7 days before proceeding. This prevents incomplete reports from being generated.

EvaluateDataAvailability.Comment: Determine if sufficient data is available to proceed with report generation

FetchHistoricalData.Comment: Start Athena query to fetch aggregated ride, payment, and rating data for the past 7 days. Query joins multiple tables for comprehensive analytics.

Parameters.QueryString: WITH weekly_rides AS (SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', ride_timestamp) as date, city, COUNT(*) as total_rides, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as completed_rides, AVG(duration_minutes) as avg_duration, SUM(fare_amount + surge_amount) as revenue FROM rideshare_analytics.rides WHERE ride_timestamp >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7' DAY GROUP BY 1, 2), weekly_payments AS (SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', payment_timestamp) as date, payment_method, COUNT(*) as transaction_count, SUM(amount) as total_amount FROM rideshare_analytics.payments WHERE payment_timestamp >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7' DAY GROUP BY 1, 2) SELECT r.date, r.city, r.total_rides, r.completed_rides, r.avg_duration, r.revenue, p.payment_method, p.transaction_count, p.total_amount FROM weekly_rides r LEFT JOIN weekly_payments p ON r.date = p.date ORDER BY r.date DESC, r.city

ProcessResults.Comment: Process Athena query results and calculate weekly KPIs including WoW growth, top cities, revenue trends, and customer insights.

FanOutReports.Comment: Generate personalized reports for each stakeholder. The Map state iterates over the list of stakeholders and creates customized reports based on their role and interests.

GeneratePersonalizedReport.Comment: Generate a personalized report for the stakeholder. Report format and content vary by role (executive, operations, finance, etc.)

SendEmail.Comment: Send the personalized report to the stakeholder via email (SNS with email subscription)

UpdateDashboards.Comment: Refresh QuickSight datasets to ensure dashboards display the latest weekly data. This triggers SPICE dataset refresh.

CompleteWorkflow.Comment: Workflow completed successfully. Prepare final summary.

Result.message: Weekly reporting workflow completed successfully. Reports distributed to all stakeholders and dashboards refreshed.

SendSuccessNotification.Comment: Send success notification to operations team

Parameters.Subject: ✅ Weekly Reporting Workflow Completed Successfully

NotifyInsufficientData.Comment: Notify that insufficient data is available for complete weekly report

Parameters.Subject: ⚠️ Weekly Reporting: Insufficient Data

FailInsufficientData.Cause: Not enough data available for the past 7 days to generate a complete weekly report

NotifyDataCheckFailure.Comment: Notify that data availability check failed

Parameters.Subject: 🚨 Weekly Reporting: Data Check Failed

FailDataCheck.Cause: Failed to check data availability for weekly report

NotifyQueryFailure.Comment: Notify that Athena query execution failed

Parameters.Subject: 🚨 Weekly Reporting: Athena Query Failed

FailQuery.Cause: Athena query execution failed during weekly report generation

Parameters.Subject: 🚨 Weekly Reporting: Processing Failed

FailProcessing.Cause: Failed to process Athena query results

Parameters.Subject: 🚨 Weekly Reporting: Distribution Failed

FailDistribution.Cause: Failed to distribute personalized reports to stakeholders

NotifyDashboardRefreshFailure.Comment: Notify that dashboard refresh failed - workflow continues as this is not critical

Parameters.Subject: ⚠️ Weekly Reporting: Dashboard Refresh Failed
